package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_data_structure_choice_slice_queue_pop_front: Layer: Data structure choice. Flag queue-style slice reslicing from the front that can retain backing arrays or shift too much data.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule522NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario522Negative(records []Rule522NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
